name: Metal Messages
messages: Welcome to the M72 World Tour weekend. Two nights. Zero repeated songs. Let's go.
Baldock boys in London. Act accordingly.
Tap contactless on everything. Don't be the one who holds the group up at the barrier.
Stadium drinks are £15 a pint. You've been warned. Drink before you go in.
Gojira are on before Metallica. Do NOT be at the bar for Gojira.
If you get split up — this app knows where everything is. Use it.
Camden is that way. The Underworld is waiting. Move.
The Hippodrome has craps. It's the only casino in London that does. You're welcome.
Set a hard limit at the casino. You know who you are.
Night 1 setlist is done. Night 2 is a completely different show. That's why you came.
Pantera and Avatar on Sunday. This is not a warm-up act situation. Get in early.
Stratford International to St Pancras — 7 minutes on the Javelin. Miss it and you're walking.
Olympic Park is a 20 minute walk from Stratford International. Follow the crowd.
FYEO is on City Road, Shoreditch. Don't let anyone make that decision for you sober.
Garlic & Shots, Soho. 101 shots. Stone coffin downstairs. Non-negotiable stop.
The Black Heart, Camden. Best metal bar in London. This is where the night starts.
Two nights of Metallica and one night of absolute chaos in between. You earned this.
Look after each other. Big city, big weekend, big memories.
Whatever happens Saturday, you still have Metallica on Sunday. Pace yourselves.
This is the No Repeat Weekend. There will never be another one like it. Be present.
